project.name: 存在终端 游戏UI
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Philosophy-themed Idle RPG game UI: CRT terminal aesthetic meets Apple-style restrained elegance. Dark background with phosphor-green and amber accents, monospace typography, glass-morphism panels, high information density.
project.designRead: Game UI / Idle RPG players / dark terminal + Apple restraint / high density / avoid neon glow and generic game UI

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: phosphor green (#00ff88) for primary feedback, amber (#CC9933) for loot/special, red (#CC3333) for danger
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: dark terminal palette with green/amber/red semantic accents, no purple/blue

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: sharp edges (0-2px radius) for terminal feel, subtle glass-morphism panels with 8-12px radius
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: JetBrains Mono for all terminal text, Noto Serif SC for Chinese concept names
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: compact terminal density: 4-8px base, tight line-height 1.3-1.5
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: ASCII progress bars, terminal prompt syntax, CRT scan-line overlays
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: flat dark surfaces, 1px borders (#111), subtle backdrop-blur for panels
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: no images, pure text/icon terminal aesthetic
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: subtle hover glow, CRT flicker animation, phosphor text-shadow

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: bottom button bar with F-key shortcuts, terminal header with system metrics
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: phosphor green primary, amber secondary, red danger
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: JetBrains Mono 13-15px body, 11px labels, Noto Serif SC for concept names
sharedProjectShellContract.radiusScale: 0px terminal elements, 8px glass panels, 12px modal frames
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: flat dark bg (#000), 1px borders (#111), backdrop-blur panels
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: terminal-style buttons with key hints, hover glow effect
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: three-column grid layout, left/right info sidebars, center canvas

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Apple design system adapted for dark terminal game UI: using Apple's spacing rhythm, shadow philosophy (whisper-light), motion curves (cubic-bezier 0.32,0.72,0,1), and radius scale, but overriding colors with CRT terminal palette (green/amber/red on black)

pages.title: 游戏主界面
pages.businessScenario: Main game HUD showing player stats, combat canvas, battle log, and action buttons
pages.visualNorthStar: CRT terminal with three-column layout: left stats, center canvas, right episteme, bottom log and CLI
pages.compositionPattern: three-column grid with header and footer bars
pages.soulElement: CRT scan-line overlay + phosphor text-shadow on all terminal text, ASCII progress bars for HP/MP/EXP

pages.title: 装备面板
pages.businessScenario: Equipment and inventory management panel with item list and detail view
pages.visualNorthStar: Glass-morphism overlay panel with terminal window chrome, two-column item list + detail layout
pages.compositionPattern: overlay modal with two-column internal grid
pages.soulElement: Terminal window chrome with being@terminal:~$ prompt, philosophy-themed equipment names in Noto Serif SC

pages.title: 图鉴面板
pages.businessScenario: Philosophy concept codex/encyclopedia with concept cards and detailed explanations
pages.visualNorthStar: Glass-morphism overlay panel showing philosophy concept cards with school tags and summaries
pages.compositionPattern: overlay modal with two-column concept list + detail layout
pages.soulElement: Philosophy concepts displayed as terminal codex entries with school-of-thought tags, amber accent for design notes
